title: Nether Ultimate Weapon
description: Legendary weapons for Minecraft! The Mace of God, smash attacks, a bow and more!
body:
### ⚔️ ULTIMATE MACE
- Damage: 8 base, 16 on smash attack
- Durability: 2500
- Smash attack = Explosion with a 6-block radius!
- Fall damage multiplier: 4x
- Fire-conductive

### 🌈 GOD'S MACE
- Damage: 150 (the most powerful!)
- Durability: 5000 (eternal)
- Rainbow texture
- Fire-conductive

🏹 NEZERA BOW - LEGENDARY BOW
- Draw animation
- Rarity: RARE
- Durability: 500

### 💀 Healer's Bone
- Rare crafting material

### ✨ FEATURES:
✅ All fire-resistant (safe in the Nether)
✅ Super durable (500–5000)
✅ Beautiful textures
✅ Animations

### 💥 KEY FEATURE - SMASH ATTACK:
Dive at the enemy with the mace → creates an explosion!
• Radius: 6 blocks
• Bonus damage: 8
• Enemies are knocked back
• Blocks remain intact!
